conversation.message_text: Kitsch: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Privacy: attnl.tv/p/ayo

Kitsch: Thank you for helping our small, woman-owned business grow! Your 25% off code is MDW25 . Click here to shop: https://mykitsch.attn.tv/aEUNrxGtVV1x .

Need help? You can always reply back to this text or call 424-240-5551 if you have questions

Kitsch: Hey, this is Katie at Kitsch! Thanks for checking out our site. 😊 https://mykitsch.attn.tv/ahJl1ptQTVhY .

Anything in particular you are shopping for today?
I just had a question regarding the 25% off code MDW 25 is that only good on full priced items?
Kitsch: The 25% off code MDW25 can be used on our website mykitsch.com. It doesn't specify that it's only for full-priced items, so feel free to apply it to your cart and see the discount!
I tried and it says code does not apply...?
Kitsch: I'm sorry about that! Can you send me a screenshot that shows the error as well as the items so I can check on my end, please? Thank you.
Surely one moment

Kitsch: Thank you for sending the screenshot! I just checked and what you're looking to purchase already has a discount pre-applied which is why the code isn't working as the system typically can't stack more than one promo at checkout. Please use it on regular-priced items instead.
That's what I figured but previous was told it could be...probably an auto response, no worries, thanks.
Template used: "Can I use two discounts? - All brands"; last updated: 2023-10-10 16:38:40.074

Kitsch: I appreciate your understanding. While you won't be able to use multiple deals at checkout, feel free to use the one that has better value for you. Check out all on-sale items here: https://mykitsch.attn.tv/aRLMURmuhowS

CLEARSTEM: Great news! Your order (470719) has shipped and will be to you soon. Click here to track your order: https://clearstem.attn.tv/asnZSvFERdDe .
CLEARSTEM: 👋 Hi! This is the CLEARSTEM concierge team, what skincare questions can I answer for you?

CLEARSTEM: LAST CHANCE! 20% off ends tonight!⏰ 

These are the final few hours for 20% off sitewide with code: MDW24.

🛍️ Shop now! https://clearstem.attn.tv/aAH-QHUZbbt4 .

CLEARSTEM: Hi friend! We noticed you checking us out... If you don't know where to start, try looking at our best sellers. Our top products are HYDRAGLOW and MINDBODYSKIN, but you really can't go wrong! https://clearstem.attn.tv/aJ6i1wRcmZhE .
CLEARSTEM: Hey Brandi, order #470719 is out for delivery. Track your order here: https://clearstem.attn.tv/am7lAUgll849 .

CLEARSTEM: Hi Brandi, thanks for your recent purchase! 

DM us for questions on your skincare routine! @clearstemskincare
https://clearstem.attn.tv/aCLc8cOqrZVg
CLEARSTEM: Get the step-by-step guide to your best skin ever. 🎧 Listen in as Founders Kayleigh & Danielle join Note to Self's Payton Sartain: https://clearstem.attn.tv/abvP5l6G9ELG .

CLEARSTEM: Sweet dreams! 😴 Get a FREE sleep mask with orders $75+. Just add the mask & your favorite skincare items to cart. Use code DREAMY at checkout.

Shop now: https://clearstem.attn.tv/aUEIXHytXfrZ .
CLEARSTEM: Last Chance: Enjoy a FREE sleep mask! 🌙 Add it to your cart along with your favorite products on orders $75+ and use code DREAMY at checkout. https://clearstem.attn.tv/aSDKMmjH4a2i .

CLEARSTEM: New on the blog! 📝 We're exploring 4 benefits of Hypochlorous Acid and how it can help acne-prone skin. 

Get the scoop: https://clearstem.attn.tv/awUkzM4sIEHw .
CLEARSTEM: 👋 Hi! This is the CLEARSTEM concierge team, what skincare questions can I answer for you?
Am I supposed to be purging when I start the acne supplement

CLEARSTEM: There's a small percentage of people that purge when switching products, but it's not typical. Not saying it couldn't happen, but just not the typical result. There are many acne products on the market that will cause a purge because they contain harsh chemicals and pore-clogging ingredients. If you're naturally acne-prone, you always want to check your skincare, makeup, and hair conditioner against our pore clogging ingredients list - https://clearstem.attn.tv/a7fONY4PAozh to ensure once you get clear, other products won't break you out all over again.
Okay yeah bc I broke out super bad over the last few days and I've been using it for about a week

CLEARSTEM: I understand where you are coming from, but it would be a good idea to first fully understand what purging means to our body. You can read more about it here: https://clearstem.attn.tv/aai1ranVUdqm Let me know what you think!

send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

escalate: When ESC include email for all escalations
When ESC code issues, specify that the customer is based in the US
Don't ESC if an item isn't available on the website or if no retailers are listed
If Dental Professionals have q's for which you don't have the answer - don't ESC, use shortcut QDP
Don't ESC inquiries related to these categories, use LAH shortcut
templates: For Philips Sonicare Toothbrush troubleshooting inquiries use PST shortcut
For inquiries about kitchen appliances, coffee makers, humidifiers use QKA shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: Don't share our code unless the customer has a different code that is not working or we are apologising for a certain inconvenience!
Codes ONLY work on grooming (norelco) & beauty products, sonicare products and avent products
Codes DON'T work on categories like lighting, automotive, hearing, TV, audio etc.
➜  For questions on these categories, send the customer to reach out to that brand directly: https://www.usa.philips.com/c-w/support-home/support-contact-page#n62Contact=

conversation.message_text: Philips: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Privacy: attnl.tv/p/UqK

Philips: Hey, I'm Jordan with Philips! Just wanted to say thanks for joining! Click this link for your 20% off code: https://philips.attn.tv/ab2w2KorpyOg .

Text me any time with questions!
Philips: Don't forget to save our contact!
I don't know how to use the discount code

Philips: I'm sorry about that! You'll find the discount box at checkout. If you're on a desktop you'll see it at the right side of your screen when you enter your shipping details. If you're using a phone, you'll need to enter your info and shipping method, and then expand the "Order Details" at the top of the order section in order to reveal the discount code box! Let me know if you can't find it.
Thank you, I made my purchase and I also want an s9985 device. How should I proceed for the 20% discount code?
Template used: "No promotions available - All brands"; last updated: 2023-10-10 16:37:45.165

Philips: You're welcome! If I understand correctly, you already made your order, and want to another another s9985? Unfortunately, the code is a one-time use only. I'm sorry, I don't have any other codes available at the moment, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out! Let me know if you have any other questions.
